author: doll-agent
content: Done. Added 9 new infinity tests in ferray-stats/src/reductions/mod.rs covering the previously-uncovered reductions: prod_with_infinity_propagates, prod_with_zero_and_infinity_is_nan (0*INF=NaN per IEEE 754), var_with_infinity_is_nan ((INF-INF)^2 = NaN), std_with_infinity_is_nan, argmin_finds_neg_infinity, argmax_finds_infinity, cumsum_propagates_infinity, cumprod_inf_then_zero_yields_nan (INF*0=NaN at the third element), ptp_with_infinity_is_inf. Combined with the pre-existing 5 INF tests for sum/mean/min/max (filed under this issue's earlier round), the reductions now have INF coverage across every operation. 243 lib tests pass.
